012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.openapi;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
020
021import java.util.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.bean.openapi3.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.inject.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.cp.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.rest.server.*;
029
030/**
031 * Basic implementation of an {@link OpenApiProvider}.
032 *
033 * <p>
034 * Default provider used by {@link RestContext} when no override is configured. Creates a fresh
035 * {@link BasicOpenApiProviderSession} per call, which walks the {@code @Rest} / {@code @RestOp}
036 * annotation graph and emits an {@link OpenApi} 3.1 document.
037 *
038 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
039 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/ApiDocsMixins">OpenAPI 3.1 Server Emission</a>
040 * </ul>
041 */
042public class BasicOpenApiProvider implements OpenApiProvider {
043
044   private final VarResolver vr;
045   private final JsonSchemaGenerator js;
046   private final Messages messages;
047   private final FileFinder fileFinder;
048   private final BeanStore beanStore;
049
050   /**
051    * Constructor.
052    *
053    * @param beanStore The bean store containing injectable beans for this provider.
054    */
055   public BasicOpenApiProvider(BeanStore beanStore) {
056      // @formatter:off
057      this(
058         OpenApiProvider
059            .create(beanStore)
060            .varResolver(()->beanStore.getBean(VarResolver.class).get())
061            .fileFinder(()->beanStore.getBean(FileFinder.class).get())
062            .messages(()->beanStore.getBean(Messages.class).get())
063            .jsonSchemaGenerator(()->beanStore.getBean(JsonSchemaGenerator.class).get())
064      );
065      // @formatter:on
066   }
067
068   /**
069    * Constructor.
070    *
071    * @param builder The builder containing the settings for this OpenAPI provider.
072    */
073   public BasicOpenApiProvider(OpenApiProvider.Builder builder) {
074      this.beanStore = builder.beanStore;
075      this.vr = builder.varResolver().orElse(beanStore.getBean(VarResolver.class).orElse(VarResolver.DEFAULT));
076      this.js = builder.jsonSchemaGenerator().orElse(beanStore.getBean(JsonSchemaGenerator.class).orElse(JsonSchemaGenerator.DEFAULT));
077      this.messages = builder.messages().orElse(null);
078      this.fileFinder = builder.fileFinder().orElse(null);
079   }
080
081   /**
082    * Returns the OpenAPI 3.1 document associated with the specified context of a {@link Rest}-annotated class.
083    *
084    * <p>
085    * Subclasses can override this to provide their own method for generating the document.
086    *
087    * @param context The context of the {@link Rest}-annotated class.
088    * @param locale The request locale.
089    * @return A new {@link OpenApi} object.
090    * @throws Exception If an error occurred producing the document.
091    */
092   @Override /* Overridden from OpenApiProvider */
093   public OpenApi getOpenApi(RestContext context, Locale locale) throws Exception {
094
095      var c = context.getResourceClass();
096      var ff = nn(fileFinder) ? fileFinder : FileFinder.create(beanStore).cp(c, null, false).build();
097      var mb = nn(messages) ? messages.forLocale(locale) : Messages.create(c).build().forLocale(locale);
098      var vrs = vr.createSession().bean(Messages.class, mb);
099      var session = new BasicOpenApiProviderSession(context, locale, ff, mb, vrs, js.getSession());
100
101      return session.getOpenApi();
102   }
103}
